workshoptitle: AI4U: Python Edition — Build AI Agents with LangChain and Oracle 26ai

tutorials.title: Lab 1: What Is an AI Agent, Really?
tutorials.description: Build your first LangChain agent with a SQL tool

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Why Agents Beat Zero-Shot Prompts
tutorials.description: Compare raw LLM, read-only, and read-write agents

tutorials.title: Lab 3: How Agents Plan the Work
tutorials.description: Watch an agent choose tools and order steps

tutorials.title: Lab 4: How Agents Actually Get Work Done
tutorials.description: Build a complete execution loop with routing

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Why Enterprise Data Matters
tutorials.description: See agents fail without context, then succeed

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Where Agent Memory Should Live
tutorials.description: Build the memory core with JSON in Oracle

tutorials.title: Lab 8: The Four Types of Agent Memory
tutorials.description: Create short-term, long-term, decision, and reference memory

tutorials.title: Lab 9: How Agents Get Better Over Time
tutorials.description: Build semantic search with vector embeddings

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Tools, Safety, and Human Control
tutorials.description: Enforce separation of duties with role-based agents
